title: protium copal var. glabrum
intro: Protium copal var. glabrum, also known as Protium copal, is a plant species belonging to the family Burseraceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Protium copal var. glabrum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Protium copal var. glabrum typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's bark, leaves, or roots, which can be consumed as teas or used in topical applications.
